shots.prompt: Rivers of molten liquid gold flowing upward against gravity, splitting into fractal deltas of shimmering metal, mirror-bright reflections bending into impossible geometry. Hyper-saturated, satisfying, seamless.
The gold liquid crystallizes into a rotating kaleidoscope of honeycomb cells, each cell opening into a tiny glowing universe, symmetrical and infinite. Oddly satisfying, fluid morph.
Drops of chrome and gold merge and bloom into morphing flowers of liquid metal, petals unfolding recursively into more petals, neon highlights breathing. Smooth, hypnotic.
Camera spirals down a vortex of liquid gold and turquoise, melting reality streaming past, dissolving into a calm mirror ocean of light. Continuous, dreamy.
